deliverable: Single-page lead generation landing page (Next.js 14, App Router). No routing beyond '/' — everything lives on one scroll.
north_star: One page. One goal. Get the visitor's phone number or a WhatsApp tap. Every pixel, word, and millisecond of load time serves this goal.

tech_stack.animations: Framer Motion v11 — `useInView` for scroll reveals, `AnimatePresence` for form success state. Max duration 350ms. Nothing bouncy — this is medical.
tech_stack.form: React Hook Form + Zod validation. No full page reload on submit.
tech_stack.images: Next.js `<Image>` component — WebP/AVIF output, explicit dimensions, lazy below fold
tech_stack.fonts: Self-hosted via `next/font` (no render-blocking Google Fonts requests)

design_language.philosophy: Premium clinical trust. Feels like a private hospital's digital presence — clean, modern, reassuring. Not a marketplace. Not a government portal. A single expert's practice.

typography.display: Plus Jakarta Sans (700, 800) — all headings, hero text
typography.body: Open Sans (400, 500, 600) — all body copy, labels, FAQs

design_language.spacing: 8px base unit. Section vertical padding: py-16 mobile, py-24 desktop.

page_sections.behavior: Sticky top. Transparent on hero, solid white with border-b on scroll (use `useScroll` + `motion.header`).
page_sections.left: Logo (SVG wordmark or clinic name in Plus Jakarta Sans 700)
right_desktop: Book Free Consultation → (pill CTA, brand color)
page_sections.right_mobile: Phone icon (click-to-call) + WhatsApp icon (both tappable) + hamburger for nav links
page_sections.implementation_note: The 'Book Free Consultation' button must be visible on desktop navbar at ALL times including hero overlap. Use z-index carefully.

page_sections.layout: Two-column on desktop (text left 55%, form right 45%), single column on mobile (text → form stacked)
page_sections.background: Subtle brand-surface (#F0FDFA) with an extremely faint dot-grid pattern (2px dots, 24px spacing, opacity 0.4)

content.h1: Painless Dental Care You Can Trust
content.subheadline: Advanced dentistry with transparent pricing and same-day appointments. Your confident smile is one call away.

trust_bar.style: Horizontal chip row on desktop. 2x2 grid on mobile. Each chip: white bg, brand border, small checkmark icon in brand color.

secondary_cta.label: Chat on WhatsApp
secondary_cta.style: Outlined button, white bg, WhatsApp green border and text

hero_visual.desktop: Doctor professional headshot OR high-quality tooth/smile illustration. If photo: rounded-2xl, brand-colored border ring, positioned overlapping the background pattern.
hero_visual.mobile: Hidden (text + form only — do not show image on mobile to save LCP budget)

form_card.headline: Book Your Free Consultation
form_card.subheadline: 15% off your first checkup — Only 4 slots left today
form_card.style: White card, brand shadow, position: sticky on desktop (scrolls with user until form exits viewport)
form_card.urgency_badge: ⏰ 4 slots available today — small pill badge above headline, amber background

fields.name: phone
fields.label: WhatsApp Number
fields.micro_copy: We'll confirm your slot on WhatsApp within 30 minutes.

form_card.submit_style: Full-width pill, brand color fill, accent shadow, slight scale transform on hover

post_submit.trigger: Replace form content with AnimatePresence success state
post_submit.content: ✅ Booked! We'll WhatsApp you within 30 minutes. / 'Add to WhatsApp: +91 XXXXX' button

form_card.privacy_note: 🔒 Your number is never shared or sold.
form_card.api_route: POST /api/leads — Zod validate → CRM webhook → respond {success: true}

page_sections.style: White bg, top+bottom brand-light border. Full-width. 4 stats separated by vertical dividers.
page_sections.animation: Count-up animation on each number when stat bar enters viewport (Framer Motion + custom counter hook). Triggers once.

page_sections.h2: Expert Care for Every Dental Need
page_sections.subheadline: From routine cleanings to full smile makeovers — all under one roof.
page_sections.grid: 3 columns desktop, 2 columns tablet, 1 column mobile

cards.description: Advanced rotary instruments and local anaesthesia for a completely comfortable experience.
cards.cta_action: Smooth scroll to FAQ item about root canal

cards.description: Titanium implants with a 98% success rate. Surgical and prosthetic under one roof.
In-chair laser whitening and take-home kits. Safe for enamel.
Metal braces, ceramic braces, and clear aligner therapy for all ages.
Child-friendly environment with painless techniques. First visit free for children under 10.
Comprehensive oral health screening with digital X-rays and a personalised treatment plan.

card_style.base: White bg, rounded-xl, brand-shadow, p-6, hover: translate-y-[-4px] transition-all duration-300
card_style.icon_container: w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-brand-light flex items-center justify-center mb-4
card_style.badge: Absolute top-right: amber bg, white text, rounded-full, text-xs
card_style.cta: text-brand font-medium text-sm with arrow icon, hover underline

page_sections.animation: Staggered card reveal on scroll (Framer Motion, 0.1s delay per card, slide up + fade in)

page_sections.layout: 50/50 split desktop. Doctor image left, credentials right. Reverse on mobile (text first).

image.style: Rounded-2xl, slight brand ring border, drop shadow. Prefer in-clinic shot (shows environment trust).

content.name: Dr. [Full Name]
content.qualifications: BDS (Gold Medalist), MDS – Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery, FICOI (USA)
content.personal_statement: Max 50 words. First person. Empathetic. E.g.: 'I started this clinic because I believe good dental health should never be held back by fear or hidden costs. Every patient gets my personal attention.'
media_badges: As Seen in: Times of India

page_sections.animation: Doctor image slides in from left, content fades in from right on scroll enter.

page_sections.subheadline: Browse before & after photos from our actual patients (shared with consent).

implementation.mobile: Horizontal swipeable carousel (`overflow-x: auto`, snap scrolling, hide scrollbar)
card_content: Patient first name + city (e.g. 'Priya R., Bengaluru')
implementation.hover_interaction: Card hover shows a before/after slider (CSS clip-path drag). On mobile: tap card to toggle between before/after.

page_sections.consent_label: All photos shared with patient consent.
page_sections.cta_below: See Your Transformation — Book Free Consultation

google_rating_display.style: Prominent badge: Google logo + stars + score + review count. Links to GBP.

video_testimonials.implementation: YouTube/Vimeo lite embed (loads iframe only on click — use `@justinribeiro/lite-youtube` or custom click-to-load). Thumbnail from YouTube API.

written_testimonials.source: Pulled from Google Places API at build time (Next.js ISR, revalidate every 24 hours)

page_sections.subheadline: No surprises. No hidden fees. Know your cost before you visit.

pricing_table.style: Clean table: Treatment | Starting At | Duration | EMI Available
pricing_table.note: 'Starting at' pricing varies by case complexity. Exact quote provided after free consultation.

emi_section.headline: Affordable EMIs Available
emi_section.copy: 0% interest EMI options available on treatments above ₹10,000. Ask us during your consultation.

page_sections.insurance: We accept cashless insurance from Star Health, Niva Bupa, and HDFC Ergo.
page_sections.cta: Get an Exact Quote — Book Free Consultation

page_sections.implementation: Accordion component. One open at a time. Smooth expand animation (Framer Motion height animation).
page_sections.schema: FAQPage JSON-LD injected via Next.js `<Script>` with `strategy='afterInteractive'`

questions.q: Is root canal treatment really painful?
questions.a: No. We use advanced rotary instruments and triple-action local anaesthesia. Most patients report feeling nothing during the procedure. You may feel mild sensitivity for 24–48 hours after, which resolves with standard pain relief.

questions.q: How much do dental implants cost in [City]?
questions.a: Our implants start at ₹18,000 per tooth, which includes the implant, abutment, and crown. The total varies by the number of implants and material chosen. We offer 0% EMI through Bajaj Finserv — no down payment required.

questions.q: How do I know your clinic is hygienic?
questions.a: We use Class B Autoclave sterilization (hospital-grade) for all instruments, disposable kits for each patient, and follow strict cross-contamination protocols. Our clinic is ISO 9001:2015 certified — inspection reports are available on request.

questions.q: Can I get a same-day appointment?
questions.a: Yes, we reserve daily slots for same-day and emergency appointments. Submit the form on this page and our team will call you within 30 minutes to confirm your slot.
We accept cashless claims from Star Health, Niva Bupa, and HDFC Ergo. For other insurers, we provide detailed receipts and treatment codes for your reimbursement claim.
Monday to Saturday: 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM. Sunday: 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM (emergency consultations only). We're closed on national holidays.

questions.q: Is teeth whitening safe for my enamel?
questions.a: Yes, when performed by a qualified dentist. We use clinically approved hydrogen peroxide concentrations. We assess your enamel health before every whitening session and won't proceed if there's a risk of sensitivity.

content.h2: Your Smile Deserves the Best Care
content.subheadline: Join 8,200+ patients who've transformed their smiles. Your free consultation takes 2 minutes to book.

ctas.label: Book Free Consultation
ctas.style: White bg, brand text, pill, hover: brand-light bg

ctas.label: Chat on WhatsApp
ctas.style: Transparent bg, white border+text, WhatsApp icon, pill

page_sections.layout: Two columns desktop. Map left (60%), contact details right (40%).

map.implementation: Google Maps embed iframe, lazy-loaded (click-to-activate on mobile to avoid LCP hit)

contact_details: Full clinic address (NAP — must match Google Business Profile exactly)
Clinic hours table (show Open/Closed badge based on current time using client-side JS)
page_sections.google_business_link: Leave Us a Google Review → (opens GBP review compose URL)

content.col_1: Logo + 1-line brand description + social icons (Instagram, Facebook, YouTube)
content.col_2: Quick Links: Home, Services, About, Book Appointment, Blog
content.col_4: Certifications: ISO badge, IDA Member badge, NABH (if applicable)

page_sections.bottom_bar: © [Year] [Clinic Name]. All rights reserved. | Privacy Policy | Disclaimer | Made with ❤️ in [City]
page_sections.disclaimer: Small gray text: 'Results may vary. All patient photos shared with consent. This website is for informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice.'

whatsapp_fab.style: Round button (56px), WhatsApp green bg (#25D366), white WhatsApp SVG icon, brand shadow
whatsapp_fab.mobile_note: On mobile, add a small pulsing ring animation to draw attention (2s loop, once per session via sessionStorage flag)

input_schema.concern: string, one of the dropdown options

api_route_spec.validation: Zod schema. Return 422 with field errors on failure.
on_success: POST to CRM_WEBHOOK_URL (env var) with full payload + timestamp
Optionally POST to WhatsApp Business API to notify clinic staff
Return { success: true, message: 'We will contact you within 30 minutes.' }
api_route_spec.on_error: Return { success: false, error: 'Something went wrong. Please try calling us directly.' } with clinic phone number.

seo_metadata.title: [Clinic Name] — Best Dentist in [City] | Free Consultation
seo_metadata.description: Looking for a trusted dentist in [City]? [Clinic Name] offers painless dental care with transparent pricing. ⭐ 4.9 Google Rating | 312 Reviews. Book your FREE consultation today.
seo_metadata.og_image: 1200x630px image with doctor photo + '4.9 ⭐ Google Rating' + clinic name. Generated as static asset.
seo_metadata.implementation: All meta via Next.js `generateMetadata()`. JSON-LD via `<script type='application/ld+json'>` in layout.tsx.

checklist: All color contrasts >= 4.5:1 for body text, >= 3:1 for large text
All interactive elements keyboard-navigable with visible focus rings
ARIA labels on icon-only buttons (WhatsApp FAB, close buttons)
Form inputs linked to labels via htmlFor/id
Error messages linked to inputs via aria-describedby
Skip-to-content link as first focusable element
All images have descriptive alt text
Accordion FAQ uses proper ARIA roles (role='button', aria-expanded, aria-controls)

shared: components/ui/LeadForm.tsx (reusable form with full RHF + Zod)
